name: The User Group
effect: Convene a group of product users to surface insights and validate the roadmap. This card is considered engaged.

clauses.name: FEEDBACK CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If users raise concerns: Concerns are documented and considered for a future cycle.

clauses.name: ALIGNMENT EFFECT
clauses.rule: When the roadmap is presented: The roadmap is considered validated.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: Next quarter: A new user group is convened to surface the same insights.

witness_quote: We really value your input here.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Did anything change since last time?
